meaning: n.<口>(配合特定场景发出气味的)气味电影
examples: Smellie improved the forceps and wrote a bestselling practical midwifery handbook.
In England the wealthiest and most influential man-midwife was the Scottish surgeon William Smellie.
Meanwhile, Canada's team of Jared Connaughton, Gavin Smellie, Oluseyi Smith and Justyn Warner crossed the line in third, but were disqualified after Connaughton ran outside his lane on the third leg.
